rules.rule_text:
title: HackTool - RedMimicry Winnti Playbook Execution
id: 95022b85-ff2a-49fa-939a-d7b8f56eeb9b
status: test
description: Detects actions caused by the RedMimicry Winnti playbook a automated
  breach emulations utility
references:
- https://redmimicry.com/posts/redmimicry-winnti/
author: Alexander Rausch
date: 2020-06-24
modified: 2023-03-01
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1106
- attack.t1059.003
- attack.t1218.011
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - \rundll32.exe
    - \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - gthread-3.6.dll
    - \Windows\Temp\tmp.bat
    - sigcmm-2.4.dll
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
